untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of eight consecutive higher highs, which necessitates lookback to 8 previous candles (high[0] > high[1] > high[2] > high[3] > high[4] > high[5] > high[6] > high[7]). The allowed indicators only support prev_high (1 bar lookback), not extended historical array indexing. A proper implementation would require either: (1) adding indicators like high_8_bars_ago through high_1_bar_ago, or (2) enabling array syntax like high[-8:-1]. Cannot reliably express this pattern with current allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using single-bar comparison logic, but this does not capture the full eight-bar consecutive pattern required by the rule. The source material references this as a 'Rising Window' variant with 7.74% average performance across 100 samples. Exit condition set to reversal of entry (lower high) as a proxy for pattern failure.
